name: TradingView Chart MCP Server
what_it_does: TradingView Chart MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with TradingView — fetching price charts and technical analysis data, retrieving indicator values (RSI, MACD, moving averages), accessing symbol information, and integrating TradingView's charting and technical analysis capabilities into agent-driven trading strategy and market analysis workflows.
use_cases: Fetching technical indicator values for stock analysis from trading agents
Retrieving price chart data and OHLCV history from market analysis agents
Running technical analysis scans from trading strategy agents
Monitoring market signals and alert conditions from trading automation agents
Analyzing cryptocurrency and stock charts from investment research agents
Building trading systems with technical analysis from algorithmic trading agents
not_for: Executing live trades (TradingView is for analysis, not order execution)
Teams needing real-time tick data (TradingView provides delayed data on free tier)
best_when: An agent needs technical analysis data from TradingView — indicator values, price charts, and market scanning for trading strategy development or market research.
avoid_when: You need order execution, fundamental data, or institutional-grade real-time feeds — use broker APIs or professional data providers.

auth.notes: TradingView public data accessible without auth. TradingView Premium account may be needed for advanced features. Unofficial API access — TradingView ToS applies.

pricing.free_tier_limits: TradingView free: delayed data, limited indicators
pricing.paid_tiers: TradingView Pro: $14.95/month with real-time data and more indicators
pricing.notes: TradingView has a free tier with delayed data. This MCP uses TradingView's unofficial/undocumented APIs — stability not guaranteed. Premium subscription needed for real-time data.

performance.rate_limits: TradingView informal rate limits — avoid aggressive automated requests

known_agent_gotchas: Uses TradingView's unofficial/undocumented API — may break without warning
TradingView ToS may prohibit automated access — review before use
Rate limiting is opaque — aggressive use may result in IP blocks
Free tier data is delayed (15-20 minutes) — not suitable for live trading
Community MCP from individual contributor — limited maintenance guarantee
TradingView symbol format specific: use EXCHANGE:SYMBOL notation (e.g. NASDAQ:AAPL)
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Unofficial API — no formal security guarantees from TradingView. Community MCP. Review TradingView ToS for automation restrictions. No credentials needed for basic access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Unofficial API — review ToS. HTTPS. Community MCP. No credentials for basic access.
